name: bash-safe
description: Blocks high-risk bash patterns: pipe-to-shell, rm -rf /, disk overwrites, eval

smartRules.name: shield:bash-safe:block-pipe-to-shell
smartRules.reason: Pipe-to-shell is a common supply-chain attack vector — blocked by bash-safe shield

smartRules.name: shield:bash-safe:block-obfuscated-exec
smartRules.reason: Obfuscated execution via base64 decode — blocked by bash-safe shield

smartRules.name: shield:bash-safe:block-rm-root
smartRules.reason: rm -rf of root or home directory is catastrophic — blocked by bash-safe shield

smartRules.name: shield:bash-safe:block-disk-overwrite
smartRules.reason: Writing directly to a block device is irreversible — blocked by bash-safe shield

smartRules.name: shield:bash-safe:review-eval
smartRules.reason: eval of dynamic content requires human approval (bash-safe shield)
